name: Iowa Agribusiness Radio Network Podcasts
description: The Iowa Agribusiness Radio Network is based out of Des Moines and reaches over 60 affiliates around the state. Our long-format weekend show called Weekend Ag Matters gives a deeper look into what has gone on on ag the past week, and it also lets you hear about Ag information close to home. We also supply interview content more often with our Special Podcasts that go out several times a week.

recent_episodes.title: Weekend Ag Matters- February 28th, 2026
recent_episodes.description: In this week's episode of Weekend Ag Matters Mark Magnuson runs down the news headlines, Riley Smith speaks with Iowa Congressman Randy Feenstra, Dustin Hoffmann is joined by Heidi Bradley of Integrated Telehealth Partners, and Russ provides his faith-based segment.

recent_episodes.title: Closing Market Podcast- Bill Moore PRICE Futures Group- 2-24-26
recent_episodes.description: There's a lot of uncertainty in the ag marketplace due to the constantly changing tariff situation. Riley Smith visits with Bill Moore of PRICE Futures Group.

recent_episodes.title: IAM Podcast 2-24-26
recent_episodes.description: In today’s show, Mark continues his conversation with National Cattlemen’s Beef Association President-Elect Kim Brackett, Riley catches up with Iowa Congressman Randy Feenstra, and Dustin talks E15 with Iowa Ag Secretary Mike Naig.

score_reason: Regional farming news and commodity prices; too tactical and local for Andreas's strategic AI/marketing positioning.
